prediction_sources.evidence_statement: Raw amino-acid sequence for the RCSB polymer entity.

RCSB title: Solution structure of human thioltransferase complex with glutathione. Entity description: PROTEIN (HUMAN THIOLTRANSFERASE). Entry keywords: OXIDOREDUCTASE HUMAN THIOLTRANSFERASE, DISULFIDE INTERMEDIATE, GLUTATHIONE, OXIDOREDUCTASE. Polymer composition: homomeric protein. Sequence-derived non-coordinate summary: hydrophobic_density=0.390476; mean_interface=0.236215; max_segment_membrane_density=0.227513; mean_disorder=0.192043. Coordinates, contacts, native interface geometry, ligand geometry, and post-seal validation labels are unopened before prediction hash.

V68 E65 topology sentinel source. membrane_context_strong transmembrane_context topology_evidence transmembrane channel/pore; biological_oligomer_context may be incidental but explicit topology has priority. Coordinates, contacts, and native topology remain post-seal holdout only.
